code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut cur = 0
mut neg = false
mut has = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
      has = true
    else
      if has
        let v = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        if v % 2 == 0
          sum = sum + v
        end
        cur = 0
        neg = false
        has = false
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if has
  let v = if neg
    -cur
  else
    cur
  end
  if v % 2 == 0
    sum = sum + v
  end
end
println("sum_even=#{sum}")
